messages.content:
You are an agent answering a question using these tools: google_search, get_stock_data, compute, get_weather.
At each step, EITHER issue exactly one more natural-language sub-query to gather missing information, OR give the final answer if you already have enough.
Respond with EXACTLY ONE of the following and nothing else:
  <sub-query>a single self-contained, single-tool question</sub-query>
  <final_answer>your concise final answer</final_answer>

Original question: What is the title of the next Avatar film, scheduled for release on December 19, 2025?

History so far:
Step 1 sub-query: What is the title of the Avatar film releasing on December 19, 2025?
  Tool: google_search
  Result: [{"title": "Avatar: Fire and Ash - Wikipedia", "link": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Avatar:_Fire_and_Ash", "snippet": "Avatar: Fire and Ash was released in the United States on December 19, 2025, by 20th Century Studios. [122][123][124] Like its predecessor, the film was subject to multiple delays (in this case, nine in total) since the crew took more time on the writing, pre-production and visual effects process.", "content": "Avatar: Fire and Ash - Wikipedia Jump to content From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia \"Avatar 3\" and \"Fire and Ash\" redirect here. For the third season of Avatar: The Last Airbender , see Avatar: The Last Airbender season 3 . For other uses, see Fire and Ash (disambiguation) . 2025 film by James Cameron Avatar: Fire and Ash Theatrical release poster Directed by James Cameron Screenplay by James Cameron Rick Jaffa Amanda Silver Story by James Cameron Rick Jaffa Amanda Silver Josh Friedman Shane Salerno Produced by James Cameron Jon Landau Starring Sam Worthington Zoe Salda\u00f1a Sigourney Weaver Stephen Lang Kate Winslet Cinematography Russell Carpenter Edited by Stephen E. Rivkin [ a ] Nicolas de Toth John Refoua Jason Gaudio James Cameron David Bren

Your next action:

response: <final_answer>The title of the next Avatar film scheduled for release on December 19, 2025, is "Avatar: Fire and Ash". It is directed by James Cameron and was released by 20th Century Studios.</final_answer>
